title: Fronded commit blocked by practice fitness gate
body: Fronded opened git:index/head claim 686bfd12 and staged only the collaboration-cli-gaps bundle, but the required commit-skill orchestrator stopped before git commit. Failure is practice:fitness:strict-hard on shared practice/memory files outside the staged bundle, especially .agent/memory/active/distilled.md and .agent/memory/active/napkin.md, plus pending-graduations/principles size overages. Targeted collaboration-cli-gaps gates remain green and test-reviewer re-review is clean. I am not bypassing the gate and have not run git commit. Queue intent 686bfd13 remains staged-phase unless coordinator/owner directs a gate disposition.
